# Pull Request

## Summary

What does this change do, and why? One or two sentences.

## Changes

- [ ] Code changes (list the meaningful ones)
- [ ] Documentation updated (`docs/project-memory/` and/or affected `docs/` pages)
- [ ] ADR added (`docs/decision-records/NNNN-...md`) if architecturally significant
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Naming-lint passes locally (`bash scripts/lint-naming.sh`)

## Linked issues / decisions

Closes #
Relates to ADR

## Screenshots or recordings

(For UI changes; delete this section if not applicable.)

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): subject`).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or client-confidential content in the diff.
- [ ] No em-dashes (`—`) introduced anywhere; see `docs/project-memory/writing-conventions.md`.
- [ ] No new files violate kebab-case ASCII naming.
- [ ] `docs/project-memory/status.md` updated if the change moves something between done / in progress / blocked.
- [ ] `docs/project-memory/session-log.md` updated for the session this work happened in.

## Additional notes

(Anything reviewers should know that doesn't fit the above. Delete if not needed.)
